channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Some in Michigan express regret as former Detroit mayor exits governor's race
Platner's online history reveals crude comments about Latin American sex workers and infidelity
item.description: Deleted Reddit posts show Maine Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner discussing prostitution and defending men who cheat on spouses overseas.

item.title: New details emerge on White House shooting, including alleged shooter's identity
Experts warn of anti-American alliance targeting data centers, fueled by Chinese money
item.description: Experts warn that climate activists, anti-Israel protesters, and other movements have formed an anti-American alliance now targeting U.S. AI infrastructure.
